title: Earth Science Nonconformity
description: What is a nonconformity in earth science?
narrative: The user is looking for a precise definition of the term "nonconformity" as it is used in geological contexts.  Relevance requires content that explains a nonconformity as a surface separating rock layers where deposition was interrupted or the underlying strata were eroded before new material was laid down—essentially a missing interval in the geologic record, sometimes including paleosols or soil horizons—and that may also mention related concepts such as disconformities or blended unconformities, without requiring detailed case studies or extensive background theory.
